meta.title: How it works — inventory your assets in 3 steps
meta.description: Add what you own, let Vaulto organise it, and see your whole picture. Then use Plans to think through wills, inheritance, insurance and more.

hero.heading: From scattered to organised, in three steps.
hero.intro: You don't have to type everything by hand. Vaulto reads your photos and documents and does the heavy lifting — so getting started takes minutes, not weekends.

steps.title: Add what you own.
steps.body: Snap a photo or upload a document and Vaulto reads it for you — drafting the details so you're not typing everything by hand. Add a room, a receipt, or a folder of paperwork in one go.
steps.detail: AI-assisted capture turns an overwhelming job into a few short sessions.

steps.title: Let Vaulto organise it.
steps.body: Group assets into collections, add the key facts that matter, and keep the documents that prove them attached right where they belong.
steps.detail: Property, accounts, investments, valuables, pensions — all in one structure.

steps.title: See the whole picture.
steps.body: Your family's assets and documents in one clear view — ready to share with the people who matter, and to plan ahead with a free overview when you're ready.
steps.detail: A clean snapshot you can hand to a solicitor or advisor.

plans.heading: When you're ready, plan what's next.
plans.intro: Your vault shows what you own. Plans help you think through what to do about it — from a will or inheritance to insurance, a prenup, or assets in more than one country. Start when it suits you, and go at your own pace.

beats.title: Pick a focus area.
beats.body: Choose the area on your mind — wills and inheritance, insurance, a prenup, cross-border assets, and more. Each one is a calm, guided space, not a long form to fill in.
beats.detail: Areas covering the moments that tend to need a plan.

beats.title: Talk it through.
beats.body: Answer a few questions in a short, plain-language conversation. Type your answers or say them out loud — whichever feels easier.
beats.detail: No jargon and no long forms. Vaulto asks; you answer in your own words.

beats.title: Get a plan made for your situation.
beats.body: Vaulto turns the conversation into a clear, personal overview of where you stand and the steps worth considering next. Start with a free overview, and go further when you're ready.
beats.detail: Use your plan to feel prepared — and to guide a conversation with a qualified professional.

plans.honesty: Plans give you general information to help you prepare and ask better questions. They are not legal, tax or financial advice.

finalCta.title: Start your vault — free
finalCta.body: Add your first few things in minutes. No spreadsheets required.
